summary: A solid audience recording captures a long first set highlighted by The Roses, On the Road Again and Cold Rain & Snow, plus a surprise Satisfaction encore.
review: The show is praised for its energetic first set with standout cuts like The Roses, On the Road Again, The Race Is On, and a smoking Cold Rain & Snow that leads into an unexpected Satisfaction encore. Reviewers note the audience‑sourced tape sounds surprisingly clear—as if plugged directly into the mics—making this a worthwhile listen despite not being a soundboard.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 4‑star ratings, highlighting strong performances and a good‑quality audience recording; no major negatives were mentioned.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the tape as clear and well‑balanced for an audience source, noting it sounds like being plugged directly into the mics with minimal ambient issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A long first set packed with highlights followed by a second‑set opener of Cold Rain & Snow and a surprise Satisfaction encore, creating an upbeat, flowing concert experience.
